concerns.text: T024/T025 implement algorithm validation for core invariants in Phase 1, but FR-003 explicitly states core invariants are tabulated (not computed) and algorithm validation applies only to additional invariants in Phase 2+. This violates the Phase 1 scope boundary.

T038 creates a combined complexity metric visualization, but FR-005 explicitly states 'Analysis focuses on crossing number and braid index as separate predictors, not composite measures.' Task contradicts functional requirement.

No task explicitly handles ambiguous or missing alternating/non-alternating classification (exclude or mark as unclassifiable). T017 filters hyperbolic volume; T028 handles tie-breaking. FR-010/SC-006 coverage gap.
Plan.md claims Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) passes with citations validated, but no task runs the Reference-Validator Agent on spec/plan citations to satisfy this gate.
